title: cepa vulgaris
intro: Cepa vulgaris, also known as the common onion, is a plant species in the Allium genus that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. Its medicinal properties include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming cepa vulgaris include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, while also exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of cepa vulgaris include dried onion powder, onion oil, and tinctures, which can be used to add flavor and medicinal value to a variety of dishes and remedies.
